package.description: The package name or path to the plugin's entry point.

oneOf.description: A glob pattern string that specifies the files and directories to be handled by the plugin's default EntryHandler instance.
An array of glob pattern strings that specifies the files and directories to be handled by the plugin's default EntryHandler instance.
A FilesOptionObject that specifies the files and directories to be handled by the plugin's default EntryHandler instance.

files.description: Specifies the files we should watch for changes to invoke re-building. This lets the user specify the files we should watch for changes to invoke re-building.

ssr.description: Path to the server-side render entry (relative to the application root, e.g. 'src/entry-server.tsx'). When set, the plugin renders HTML on the server: in development via Vite's ssrLoadModule, and in production from the built SSR bundle. Omit for a client-only (SPA) app.

output.description: The build output directory (relative to the application root) the plugin builds the client into. Defaults to 'dist'. Point Harper's `static` plugin at the same directory (e.g. files: 'dist/**') so it can serve the built output.

hmr.description: Whether to run the Vite dev server with hot module replacement (HMR). When omitted, defaults to Harper's dev mode (the DEV_MODE environment variable, set by `harper dev`). Set to true to force the dev server, or false to force the hybrid production build (build + recompile-on-change). Serving the built output is handled by Harper's `static` plugin, configured alongside this plugin.
